turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Thank you for calling Cascade Family Dentistry. You've reached our after-hours line. This is Aly. How can I help you?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Hey, I have an awful toothache that's kept me up all night. Are you open?

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Unfortunately, our office is closed until Monday morning.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: But we do have an on-call team that reviews urgent situations like this, and someone will follow up with you as soon as possible.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: I'm going to gather a little information so I can pass it along to our on-call team. Let's start with your name and date of birth.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: My name is Finn Leo. My birthday is May 10, 1997.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Perfect. What is a good phone number to reach you at?

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Great. Thank you. Can you tell me where the pain is coming from and when it started?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: It's my bottom molar on the right side. I noticed it a couple days ago, but it's gotten worse today and it's starting to spread into my jaw.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: I'll make a note of that. On a scale from 1 to 10, how bad is it right now, and how bad was it at its worst?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Before it was only a 1 or 2, but today it's climbed up to about a 6.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Okay. Have you noticed any facial swelling, fever, or difficulty swallowing?

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Okay, that's good. I'm sending your information to the on-call team now.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Keep your phone nearby because one of our staff members will be calling you shortly.
